Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.9. PnP-DETR

pairs.src: The pool sampler provides contextual information at different scales using aggregation weights.
pairs.tgt: 池化采样器利用聚合权重在不同尺度上提供上下文信息。

pairs.src: Here, some feature vectors may provide local context while others may capture the global context.
pairs.tgt: 此处，部分特征向量可能提供局部上下文，而其他特征向量可能捕获全局上下文。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: Dynamic-DETR
pairs.tgt: Dynamic-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: Dynamic-DETR [28] introduces dynamic attention in the encoder–decoder network of DETR to solve the slow training convergence issue and detection of small objects.
pairs.tgt: Dynamic-DETR [28]在DETR的编码器-解码器网络中引入动态注意力，以解决训练收敛缓慢和小目标检测问题。

pairs.src: Firstly, a convolutional dynamic encoder is proposed to have different attention types to the selfattention module of the encoder network to make the training convergence faster.
pairs.tgt: 首先，提出了一种卷积动态编码器，为编码器网络的自注意模块提供不同的注意力类型，以加快训练收敛。

pairs.src: The attention of this encoder depends on various factors such as spatial effect, scale effect and input feature dimensions effect.
pairs.tgt: 该编码器的注意力取决于多种因素，如空间效应、尺度效应和输入特征维度效应。

pairs.src: Secondly, ROI-based dynamic attention is replaced with cross-attention in the decoder network.
pairs.tgt: 其次，在解码器网络中用交叉注意力替代了基于ROI的动态注意力。

pairs.src: This decoder helps to focus on small objects, reduces learning difficulty and converges the network faster.
pairs.tgt: 该解码器有助于关注小目标，降低学习难度，并使网络更快收敛。

pairs.src: In Figure 5, the bottom right box represents Dynamic-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 5中，右下方的方块表示Dynamic-DETR。

pairs.src: This dynamic encoder–decoder network is explained in detail as follows.
pairs.tgt: 该动态编码器-解码器网络详细说明如下。

pairs.src: Dynamic Encoder: The Dynamic-DETR uses a convolutional approach for the selfattention module.
pairs.tgt: 动态编码器：Dynamic-DETR对自注意模块采用卷积方法。

pairs.src: Given the feature vectors $F = \{ F 1 , \cdots , F _ { n } \}$ , where n = 5 represents object detectors from the feature pyramid, the multi-scale self-attention (MSA) is as follows:
pairs.tgt: 给定特征向量$F = \{ F 1 , \cdots , F _ { n } \}$，其中n=5表示来自特征金字塔的目标检测器，多尺度自注意力（MSA）如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: However, it is impossible because of the various scale feature maps from the FPN.
pairs.tgt: 然而，由于FPN产生的多尺度特征图，这是不可能实现的。

pairs.src: The feature maps of different scales are equalized within neighbors using 2D convolution as in the pyramid convolution [212].
pairs.tgt: 使用二维卷积在相邻尺度间均衡不同尺度的特征图，如金字塔卷积[212]所述。

pairs.src: It focuses on the spatial locations of the un-resized mid-layer and transfers information to its scaled neighbors.
pairs.tgt: 它关注未调整大小的中间层的空间位置，并将信息传递到其尺度相邻层。

pairs.src: Moreover, SE [213] is applied to combine the features to provide scale attention.
pairs.tgt: 此外，应用SE [213]来组合特征以提供尺度注意力。

pairs.src: Dynamic Decoder: The dynamic decoder uses mixed attention blocks in place of multihead layers to ease learning in the cross-attention network and improve the detection of small objects.
pairs.tgt: 动态解码器：动态解码器使用混合注意块替代多头层，以简化交叉注意力网络中的学习并改善小目标检测。

pairs.src: It also uses dynamic convolution instead of a cross-attention layer inspired by ConvBERT [214] in natural language processing (NLP).
pairs.tgt: 受自然语言处理（NLP）中ConvBERT [214]的启发，它还使用动态卷积替代交叉注意力层。

pairs.src: Firstly, RoI pooling [1] is introduced in the decoder network, after which position embeddings are replaced with box encoding $B E \in \mathbb { R } ^ { p \times 4 }$ as the image size.
pairs.tgt: 首先，在解码器网络中引入RoI池化[1]，之后用框编码$B E \in \mathbb { R } ^ { p \times 4 }$替代位置嵌入作为图像尺寸。

pairs.src: The output from the dynamic encoder, along with box encoding $B E ,$ is fed to the dynamic decoder to pool image features $R \in \mathbb { R } ^ { p \times s \times s \times c _ { i } }$ from the feature pyramid as follows:
pairs.tgt: 动态编码器的输出与框编码$B E ,$一起输入动态解码器，从特征金字塔中池化图像特征$R \in \mathbb { R } ^ { p \times s \times s \times c _ { i } }$，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: where s is the size of the pooling parameter, and $c _ { i }$ represents the quantity of channels of $F _ { e n c o d e r }$ .
pairs.tgt: 其中s为池化参数的大小，$c _ { i }$表示$F _ { e n c o d e r }$的通道数。

pairs.src: To feed this into the cross-attention module, input embeddings $q e \in R ^ { p \times c _ { i } }$ are required for object queries.
pairs.tgt: 为了将其输入交叉注意力模块，目标查询需要输入嵌入$q e \in R ^ { p \times c _ { i } }$。

pairs.src: These embeddings are passed through the multi-head self-attention (MHSAttn) layer as follows:
pairs.tgt: 这些嵌入通过多头自注意力（MHSAttn）层传递，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: Then, these query embeddings are passed through the fully connected layer (dynamic filters) as follows:
pairs.tgt: 然后，这些查询嵌入通过全连接层（动态滤波器）传递，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: Finally, cross-attention between features and object queries is performed with 1 × 1 convolution using dynamic filters $F i l t e r ^ { q e }$
pairs.tgt: 最后，使用动态滤波器$F i l t e r ^ { q e }$通过1×1卷积执行特征与目标查询之间的交叉注意力

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.10. Dynamic-DETR

pairs.src: These features are passed through FFN layers to provide various predictions as updated object-embedding, updated box-encoding, and the object class.
pairs.tgt: 这些特征通过FFN层传递，以提供多种预测结果，包括更新的目标嵌入、更新的框编码和目标类别。

pairs.src: This process eases the learning of the cross-attention module by focusing on sparse areas and then spreading to global regions.
pairs.tgt: 该过程通过先聚焦稀疏区域再扩展到全局区域，简化了交叉注意力模块的学习。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR

pairs.src: YOLOS-DETR
pairs.tgt: YOLOS-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR

pairs.src: Vision transformer (ViT) [8], inherited from NLP, performs well on the image recognition task.
pairs.tgt: 视觉Transformer（ViT）[8]继承自NLP，在图像识别任务上表现良好。

pairs.src: ViT-FRCNN [215] uses a pre-trained backbone (ViT) for a CNN-based detector.
pairs.tgt: ViT-FRCNN [215]使用预训练的骨干网络（ViT）用于基于CNN的检测器。

pairs.src: It utilizes convolution neural networks and relies on strong 2D inductive biases and regionwise pooling operations for object-level perception.
pairs.tgt: 它利用卷积神经网络，依赖强二维归纳偏置和逐区域池化操作进行目标级感知。

pairs.src: Other similar works, such as DETR [11], introduce 2D inductive bias using CNNs and pyramidal features.
pairs.tgt: 其他类似工作，如DETR [11]，使用CNN和金字塔特征引入二维归纳偏置。

pairs.src: YOLOS-DETR [29] presents the transferability and versatility of the transformer from image recognition to detection in the sequence aspect using the least information about the spatial design of the input.
pairs.tgt: YOLOS-DETR [29]展示了Transformer从图像识别到序列维度检测的可迁移性和多功能性，使用关于输入空间设计的最少信息。

pairs.src: It closely follows the ViT architecture with two simple modifications.
pairs.tgt: 它紧密遵循ViT架构，并进行了两处简单修改。

pairs.src: Firstly, it removes the image-classification patches (CLS) and adds randomly initialized one hundred detection patches (DET) as [216] along with the input patch embeddings for object detection.
pairs.tgt: 首先，它移除了图像分类补丁（CLS），并添加了随机初始化的一百个检测补丁（DET）[216]，以及用于目标检测的输入补丁嵌入。

pairs.src: Secondly, similar to DETR, a bipartite matching loss is used instead of the ViT classification loss.
pairs.tgt: 其次，与DETR类似，使用二分匹配损失替代ViT分类损失。

pairs.src: The transformer encoder takes the generated sequence as input as follows:
pairs.tgt: Transformer编码器将生成的序列作为输入，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR

pairs.src: where I is the input image $\mathbf { I } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { h _ { i } \times w _ { i } \times c _ { i } }$ that is reshaped into 2D tokens $\mathbf { I } _ { p } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { n _ { i } \times ( R ^ { 2 } \cdot c _ { i } ) }$ Here, $h _ { i }$ represents the height, and $w _ { i }$ indicates the width of the input image.
pairs.tgt: 其中I为输入图像$\mathbf { I } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { h _ { i } \times w _ { i } \times c _ { i } }$，被重塑为二维令牌$\mathbf { I } _ { p } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { n _ { i } \times ( R ^ { 2 } \cdot c _ { i } ) }$此处，$h _ { i }$表示高度，$w _ { i }$表示输入图像的宽度。

pairs.src: $c _ { i }$ is the total number of channels.
pairs.tgt: $c _ { i }$为通道总数。

pairs.src: $( r , r )$ is each token resolution, and $\begin{array} { r } { n _ { i } = \frac { h _ { i } w _ { i } } { r ^ { 2 } } } \end{array}$ is the total number of tokens.
pairs.tgt: $( r , r )$为每个令牌的分辨率，$\begin{array} { r } { n _ { i } = \frac { h _ { i } w _ { i } } { r ^ { 2 } } } \end{array}$为令牌总数。

pairs.src: These tokens are mapped to $D _ { i }$ dimensions with linear projection, $\mathbf { L } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { ( r ^ { 2 } \cdot c _ { i } ) \times D _ { i } }$ The result of this projection is $\mathbf { I } _ { p } \mathbf { L }$ .
pairs.tgt: 这些令牌通过线性投影映射到$D _ { i }$维，$\mathbf { L } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { ( r ^ { 2 } \cdot c _ { i } ) \times D _ { i } }$该投影的结果为$\mathbf { I } _ { p } \mathbf { L }$。

pairs.src: The encoder also takes one hundred randomly initialized learnable tokens $\mathbf { I } _ { d } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { 1 0 0 \times D _ { i } }$ .
pairs.tgt: 编码器还接收一百个随机初始化的可学习令牌$\mathbf { I } _ { d } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { 1 0 0 \times D _ { i } }$。

pairs.src: To keep the positional information, positional embeddings $\mathbf { P E } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { ( n _ { i } + 1 0 0 ) \times D _ { i } }$ are also added.
pairs.tgt: 为保留位置信息，还添加了位置嵌入$\mathbf { P E } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { ( n _ { i } + 1 0 0 ) \times D _ { i } }$。

pairs.src: The encoder of the transformer contains a multi-head self-attention mechanism and one MLP block with a GELU [217] non-linear activation function.
pairs.tgt: Transformer的编码器包含多头自注意力机制和一个MLP块，使用GELU [217]非线性激活函数。

pairs.src: Layer normalization (LN) [218] is added between each self-attention and MLP block as follows:
pairs.tgt: 层归一化（LN）[218]添加在每个自注意力和MLP块之间，如下所示：

Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.11. YOLOS-DETR

pairs.src: where $s _ { n }$ is the encoder input sequence.
pairs.tgt: 其中$s _ { n }$为编码器输入序列。

pairs.src: In Figure 6, the top-right block indicates YOLOS-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 6中，右上角的方块表示YOLOS-DETR。

pairs.tgt: 添加YOLOS-DETR [29]、Anchor-DETR [30]和Sparse-DETR [31]后的原始DETR结构。

pairs.src: Here, the network is a simple DETR network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
pairs.tgt: 此处，网络是一个简单的DETR网络，改进部分用小的彩色方块标示。

pairs.tgt: 黄色方块表示YOLOS-DETR，浅蓝色方块表示Anchor-DETR，浅橙色方块表示Sparse-DETR。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.12. Anchor-DETR

pairs.src: Anchor-DETR
pairs.tgt: Anchor-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.12. Anchor-DETR

pairs.src: DETR uses learnable embeddings as object queries in the decoder network.
pairs.tgt: DETR使用可学习嵌入作为解码器网络中的目标查询。

pairs.src: These input embeddings do not have a clear physical meaning and cannot illustrate where to focus.
pairs.tgt: 这些输入嵌入没有明确的物理意义，无法说明应关注何处。

pairs.src: It is challenging to optimize the network as object queries concentrate on something other than specific regions.
pairs.tgt: 由于目标查询集中于非特定区域，优化网络具有挑战性。

pairs.src: Anchor-DETR [30] solves this issue by proposing object queries as anchor points that are extensively used in CNN-based object detectors.
pairs.tgt: Anchor-DETR [30]通过提出将目标查询作为锚点来解决这一问题，锚点在基于CNN的目标检测器中被广泛使用。

pairs.src: This query design can provide multiple object predictions in one region.
pairs.tgt: 这种查询设计可以在一个区域提供多个目标预测。

pairs.src: Moreover, a few modifications in the attention are proposed that reduce the memory cost and improve performance.
pairs.tgt: 此外，还提出了对注意力的若干修改，以降低内存成本并提高性能。

pairs.src: In Figure 6, the yellow block shows Anchor-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 6中，黄色方块展示了Anchor-DETR。

pairs.src: The two main contributions of Anchor-DETR, query and attention variant design, are explained as follows.
pairs.tgt: Anchor-DETR的两个主要贡献——查询设计和注意力变体设计——说明如下。

pairs.src: Row and Column Decoupled-Attention: DETR requires huge GPU memory, as in [219,220], because of the complexity of the cross-attention module.
pairs.tgt: 行列解耦注意力：DETR需要大量GPU内存，如[219,220]所述，这是由于交叉注意力模块的复杂性。

pairs.src: It is more complex than the self-attention module in the decoder.
pairs.tgt: 它比解码器中的自注意力模块更为复杂。

pairs.src: Although Deformable-DETR reduces memory cost, it still causes random memory access, making the network slower.
pairs.tgt: 尽管Deformable-DETR降低了内存成本，但仍会导致随机内存访问，使网络变慢。

pairs.src: Row– column decoupled attention (RCDA), as shown in the blue block of Figure 6, reduces memory and provides similar or better efficiency.
pairs.tgt: 行列解耦注意力（RCDA），如Figure 6蓝色方块所示，减少了内存消耗并提供了相当或更好的效率。

pairs.src: Anchor Points as Object Queries: The CNN-based object detectors consider anchor points as the relative position of the input feature maps.
pairs.tgt: 锚点作为目标查询：基于CNN的目标检测器将锚点视为输入特征图的相对位置。

pairs.src: In contrast, transformer-based detectors take uniform grid locations, handcraft locations, or learned locations as anchor points.
pairs.tgt: 相比之下，基于Transformer的检测器采用均匀网格位置、手工设计位置或学习位置作为锚点。

pairs.src: Anchor-DETR considers two types of anchor points: learned anchor locations and grid anchor locations.
pairs.tgt: Anchor-DETR考虑两种类型的锚点：学习锚位置和网格锚位置。

pairs.src: The grid anchor locations are input image grid points.
pairs.tgt: 网格锚位置为输入图像的网格点。

pairs.src: The learned anchor locations are uniform distributions from 0 to 1 (randomly initialized) and updated using the learned parameters.
pairs.tgt: 学习锚位置为从0到1的均匀分布（随机初始化），并使用学习参数进行更新。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR

pairs.src: Sparse-DETR
pairs.tgt: Sparse-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR

pairs.src: Sparse-DETR [31] filters the encoder tokens by a learnable cross-attention map predictor.
pairs.tgt: Sparse-DETR [31]通过可学习的交叉注意力图预测器过滤编码器令牌。

pairs.src: After distinguishing these tokens in the decoder network, it focuses only on foreground tokens to reduce computational costs.
pairs.tgt: 在解码器网络中区分这些令牌后，它仅关注前景令牌以降低计算成本。

pairs.src: Sparse-DETR introduces the scoring module, aux-heads in the encoder, and the Top-k queries selection module for the decoder.
pairs.tgt: Sparse-DETR引入了评分模块、编码器中的辅助头和解码器的Top-k查询选择模块。

pairs.src: In Figure 6, the light orange box represents Sparse-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 6中，浅橙色方块表示Sparse-DETR。

pairs.src: Firstly, it determines the saliency of tokens, fed as input to the encoder, using the scoring network that selects top $\rho \%$ tokens.
pairs.tgt: 首先，它使用评分网络确定输入到编码器的令牌的显著性，选择前$\rho \%$个令牌。

pairs.src: Secondly, the aux-head takes the top-k tokens from the output of the encoder network.
pairs.tgt: 其次，辅助头从编码器网络的输出中获取前k个令牌。

pairs.src: Finally, the top-k tokens are used as the decoder object queries.
pairs.tgt: 最后，前k个令牌被用作解码器目标查询。

pairs.src: The salient token prediction module refines encoder tokens that are taken from the backbone feature map using threshold $\rho$ and updates the features $x _ { l } - 1$ as follows:
pairs.tgt: 显著令牌预测模块使用阈值$\rho$对从骨干特征图中提取的编码器令牌进行细化，并更新特征$x _ { l } - 1$，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR

pairs.src: where DeformAttn is the deformable attention, FFN is the feed-forward network, and LN is the layer normalization.
pairs.tgt: 其中DeformAttn为可变形注意力，FFN为前馈网络，LN为层归一化。

pairs.src: Then, the decoder cross-attention map (DAM) accumulates the attention weights of decoder object queries, and the network is trained by minimizing loss between prediction and binarized DAM as follows:
pairs.tgt: 然后，解码器交叉注意力图（DAM）累积解码器目标查询的注意力权重，网络通过最小化预测与二值化DAM之间的损失进行训练，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.13. Sparse-DETR

pairs.src: where BCELoss is the binary cross-entropy (BCE) loss, $D A M _ { k } ^ { b }$ is the k-th binarized DAM value of the encoder token, and sn is the scoring network.
pairs.tgt: 其中BCELoss为二元交叉熵（BCE）损失，$D A M _ { k } ^ { b }$为编码器令牌的第k个二值化DAM值，sn为评分网络。

pairs.src: In this way, sparse-DETR minimizes the computation by significantly eliminating encoder tokens.
pairs.tgt: 通过这种方式，sparse-DETR通过显著减少编码器令牌来最小化计算量。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR

pairs.src: $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR
pairs.tgt: $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR

pairs.src: Much work [20,22–25] has been proposed to make the training convergence faster by modifying the cross-attention module.
pairs.tgt: 许多工作[20,22–25]通过修改交叉注意力模块来加快训练收敛。

pairs.src: Many researchers [20] used multi-scale feature maps to improve performance for small objects.
pairs.tgt: 许多研究者[20]使用多尺度特征图来提升小目标的性能。

pairs.src: However, the solution for high computation complexity has yet to be proposed.
pairs.tgt: 然而，针对高计算复杂度问题的解决方案尚未被提出。

pairs.src: D2ETR [32] achieves better performance with low computational cost.
pairs.tgt: D2ETR [32]以较低的计算成本实现了更好的性能。

pairs.src: Without an encoder module, the decoder directly uses the fine-fused feature maps provided by the backbone network with a novel cross-scale attention module.
pairs.tgt: 在没有编码器模块的情况下，解码器直接使用骨干网络提供的精细融合特征图，配合新颖的跨尺度注意力模块。

pairs.src: The D2ETR contains two main modules: a backbone and a decoder.
pairs.tgt: D2ETR包含两个主要模块：骨干网络和解码器。

pairs.src: The backbone network based on a pyramid vision transformer (PVT) consists of two parallel layers: one for cross-scale interaction and another for intra-scale interaction.
pairs.tgt: 基于金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT）的骨干网络由两个并行层组成：一个用于跨尺度交互，另一个用于尺度内交互。

pairs.src: This backbone contains four transformer levels to provide multi-scale feature maps.
pairs.tgt: 该骨干网络包含四个Transformer层级，以提供多尺度特征图。

pairs.src: All levels have the same architecture, depending on the basic module of the selected transformer.
pairs.tgt: 所有层级具有相同的架构，取决于所选Transformer的基本模块。

pairs.src: The backbone also contains three fusing levels in parallel with four transformer levels.
pairs.tgt: 骨干网络还包含三个与四个Transformer层级并行的融合层级。

pairs.src: These fusing levels provide a cross-scale fusion of input features.
pairs.tgt: 这些融合层级提供输入特征的跨尺度融合。

pairs.src: The i-th fusing level is shown in the light green block of Figure 7.
pairs.tgt: 第i个融合层级如Figure 7中浅绿色方块所示。

pairs.src: The cross-scale attention is formulated as follows:
pairs.tgt: 跨尺度注意力的公式如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR

pairs.src: where $f _ { j } ^ { * }$ is the fused form feature map $f _ { j } .$ Given that L is the input of the decoder as the last-level feature map, the final result of cross-scale attention is $f _ { 1 } ^ { * } , f _ { 2 } ^ { * } , \ldots , f _ { L } ^ { * }$ .
pairs.tgt: 其中$f _ { j } ^ { * }$为融合后的特征图$f _ { j } .$给定L作为解码器的输入即最高层级特征图，跨尺度注意力的最终结果为$f _ { 1 } ^ { * } , f _ { 2 } ^ { * } , \ldots , f _ { L } ^ { * }$。

pairs.src: The output of this backbone is fed to the decoder that takes object queries in parallel.
pairs.tgt: 该骨干网络的输出被送入解码器，解码器同时接收目标查询。

pairs.src: It provides output embeddings independently transformed into class labels and box coordinates by a forward feed network.
pairs.tgt: 它提供输出嵌入，由前馈网络独立转换为类别标签和边界框坐标。

pairs.src: Without an encoder module, the decoder directly used the finefused feature maps provided by the backbone network, with a novel cross-scale attention module providing better performance with low computational cost.
pairs.tgt: 在没有编码器模块的情况下，解码器直接使用骨干网络提供的精细融合特征图，配合新颖的跨尺度注意力模块，以较低的计算成本实现更好的性能。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.14. $D ^ { 2 }$ ETR

pairs.src: ![](Images_GFP684MN/efd2b5160235229e6876e2db5da9d069ea1cb7627413b0a9242a2a0de9dfe6e9.jpg) Figure 7.
pairs.tgt: ![](Images_GFP684MN/efd2b5160235229e6876e2db5da9d069ea1cb7627413b0a9242a2a0de9dfe6e9.jpg) Figure 7。

pairs.src: The structure of the original DETR after the addition of D2ETR [32], FP-DETR [33], and CF-DETR [34].
pairs.tgt: 添加D2ETR [32]、FP-DETR [33]和CF-DETR [34]后的原始DETR结构。

pairs.src: Here, the network is a simple DETR network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
pairs.tgt: 此处，网络是一个简单的DETR网络，改进部分用小的彩色方块标示。

pairs.src: The light green block indicates D2ETR, the pink block indicates FP-DETR, and the blue box represents CF-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 浅绿色方块表示D2ETR，粉色方块表示FP-DETR，蓝色方块表示CF-DETR。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.15. FP-DETR

pairs.src: FP-DETR
pairs.tgt: FP-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.15. FP-DETR

pairs.src: Modern CNN-based detectors like YOLO [221] and Faster-RCNN [1] utilize specialized layers on top of backbones pre-trained on ImageNet to enjoy pre-training benefits such as improved performance and faster training convergence.
pairs.tgt: 现代基于CNN的检测器，如YOLO [221]和Faster-RCNN [1]，利用在ImageNet上预训练的骨干网络之上的专用层，以享受预训练带来的好处，如改进的性能和更快的训练收敛。

pairs.src: The DETR network and its improved version [21] only pre-train its backbone while training both encoder and decoder layers from scratch.
pairs.tgt: DETR网络及其改进版本[21]仅预训练其骨干网络，同时从头训练编码器和解码器层。

pairs.src: Thus, the transformer needs massive training data for fine-tuning.
pairs.tgt: 因此，Transformer需要大量训练数据进行微调。

pairs.src: The main reason for not pre-training the detection transformer is the difference between the pre-training and final detection tasks.
pairs.tgt: 不对检测Transformer进行预训练的主要原因是预训练任务与最终检测任务之间的差异。

pairs.src: Firstly, the decoder module of the transformer takes multiple object queries as input for detecting objects, while ImageNet classification takes only a single query (class token).
pairs.tgt: 首先，Transformer的解码器模块接收多个目标查询作为输入以检测目标，而ImageNet分类仅接受单个查询（类别令牌）。

pairs.src: Secondly, the self-attention module and the projections on input query embeddings in the cross-attention module easily overfit a single class query, making the decoder network difficult to pre-train. Moreover, the downstream detection task focuses on classification and localization, while the upstream task considers only classification for the objects of interest.
pairs.tgt: 其次，自注意力模块和交叉注意力模块中对输入查询嵌入的投影容易对单个类别查询过拟合，使得解码器网络难以预训练。此外，下游检测任务关注分类和定位，而上游任务仅考虑感兴趣目标的分类。

pairs.src: FP-DETR [33] reformulates the pre-training and fine-tuning stages for detection transformers.
pairs.tgt: FP-DETR [33]重新制定了检测Transformer的预训练和微调阶段。

pairs.src: In Figure 7, the pink block indicates FP-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 7中，粉色方块表示FP-DETR。

pairs.src: It takes only the encoder network of the detection transformer for pre-training, as it is challenging to pre-train the decoder on the ImageNet classification task.
pairs.tgt: 它仅采用检测Transformer的编码器网络进行预训练，因为在ImageNet分类任务上预训练解码器具有挑战性。

pairs.src: Moreover, DETR uses both the encoder and CNN backbone as feature extractors.
pairs.tgt: 此外，DETR同时使用编码器和CNN骨干网络作为特征提取器。

pairs.src: FP-DETR replaces the CNN backbone with a multi-scale tokenizer and uses the encoder network to extract features.
pairs.tgt: FP-DETR用多尺度分词器替代CNN骨干网络，并使用编码器网络提取特征。

pairs.src: It fully pre-trains the Deformable-DETR on the ImageNet dataset and fine-tunes it for final detection that achieves competitive performance.
pairs.tgt: 它在ImageNet数据集上完全预训练Deformable-DETR，并对其进行微调以完成最终检测，实现了有竞争力的性能。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.16. CF-DETR

pairs.src: CF-DETR
pairs.tgt: CF-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.16. CF-DETR

pairs.src: CF-DETR [34] observes that COCO-style metric average precision (AP) results for small objects on detection transformers at low IoU threshold values are better than CNNbased detectors.
pairs.tgt: CF-DETR [34]观察到在低IoU阈值下，检测Transformer上基于COCO风格的度量平均精度（AP）对小目标的结果优于基于CNN的检测器。

pairs.src: It refines the predicted locations by utilizing local information, as incorrect bounding box location reduces performance on small objects.
pairs.tgt: 它通过利用局部信息来细化预测位置，因为不正确的边界框位置会降低小目标的性能。

pairs.src: CF-DETR introduces the transformer-enhanced FPN (TEF) module, coarse layers, and fine layers into the decoder network of DETR.
pairs.tgt: CF-DETR将Transformer增强的FPN（TEF）模块、粗层和细层引入DETR的解码器网络。

pairs.src: In Figure 7, the blue box represents CF-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 7中，蓝色方块表示CF-DETR。

pairs.src: The TEF module provides the same functionality as FPN, has non-local features E4 and E4 extracted from the backbone, and E5 features taken from the encoder output.
pairs.tgt: TEF模块提供与FPN相同的功能，具有从骨干网络提取的非局部特征E4和E4，以及从编码器输出获取的E5特征。

pairs.src: The features of the TEF module and the encoder network are fed to the decoder as input.
pairs.tgt: TEF模块和编码器网络的特征作为输入送入解码器。

pairs.src: The decoder modules introduce a coarse block and a fine block.
pairs.tgt: 解码器模块引入了粗块和细块。

pairs.src: The coarse block selects foreground features from the global context.
pairs.tgt: 粗块从全局上下文中选择前景特征。

pairs.src: The fine block has two modules: adaptive scale-fusion (ASF) and local cross-attention (LCA), further refining coarse boxes.
pairs.tgt: 细块包含两个模块：自适应尺度融合（ASF）和局部交叉注意力（LCA），进一步细化粗框。

pairs.src: In summary, these modules refine and enrich the features by fusing global and local information to improve detection transformer performance.
pairs.tgt: 总之，这些模块通过融合全局和局部信息来细化和丰富特征，以提升检测Transformer的性能。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.17. DAB-DETR

pairs.src: DAB-DETR
pairs.tgt: DAB-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.17. DAB-DETR

pairs.src: DAB-DETR [72] uses the bounding box coordinates as object queries in the decoder and gradually updates them in every layer.
pairs.tgt: DAB-DETR [72]将边界框坐标作为解码器中的目标查询，并在每一层中逐步更新。

pairs.src: In Figure 8, the purple block indicates DAB-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 8中，紫色方块表示DAB-DETR。

pairs.src: These box coordinates make training convergence faster by providing positional information and using the height and width values to update the positional attention map.
pairs.tgt: 这些边界框坐标通过提供位置信息并利用高度和宽度值更新位置注意力图，使训练收敛更快。

pairs.src: This type of object query provides better spatial information prior to the attention mechanism and provides a simple query formulation mechanism.
pairs.tgt: 这类目标查询在注意力机制之前提供了更优的空间信息先验，并提供了一种简单的查询构建机制。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.17. DAB-DETR

pairs.src: ![](Images_GFP684MN/9c3e4a57096bb1f03483aa216c98eb81a123bf892b35fc6ae6d6683f955b1cf3.jpg) Figure 8.
pairs.tgt: ![](Images_GFP684MN/9c3e4a57096bb1f03483aa216c98eb81a123bf892b35fc6ae6d6683f955b1cf3.jpg) Figure 8。

pairs.src: The structure of the original DETR after the addition of DAB-DETR [72], DN-DETR [35], and AdaMixer [36].
pairs.tgt: 添加DAB-DETR [72]、DN-DETR [35]和AdaMixer [36]后原始DETR的结构。

pairs.src: Here, the network is a simple DETR network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
pairs.tgt: 此处，网络为简单的DETR网络，改进部分以小彩色方块标示。

pairs.src: The purple block indicates DAB-DETR, the dark green block indicates DN-DETR, and light green box represents AdaMixer.
pairs.tgt: 紫色方块表示DAB-DETR，深绿色方块表示DN-DETR，浅绿色方块表示AdaMixer。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.17. DAB-DETR

pairs.src: The decoder network contains two main networks: a self-attention network to update queries and a cross-attention network to find feature probing.
pairs.tgt: 解码器网络包含两个主要网络：用于更新查询的自注意力网络和用于寻找特征探测的交叉注意力网络。

pairs.src: The difference between the self-attention of the original DETR and DAB-DETR is that the query and key matrices also have position information taken from bounding box coordinates.
pairs.tgt: 原始DETR的自注意力与DAB-DETR的区别在于，查询矩阵和键矩阵还包含从边界框坐标中获取的位置信息。

pairs.src: The cross-attention module concatenates the position and content information in key and query matrices and determines their corresponding heads.
pairs.tgt: 交叉注意力模块将键矩阵和查询矩阵中的位置信息与内容信息进行拼接，并确定其对应的头。

pairs.src: The decoder takes input embeddings as content queries and anchor boxes as positional queries to find object probabilities related to anchors and content queries.
pairs.tgt: 解码器将输入嵌入作为内容查询，将锚框作为位置查询，以查找与锚点和内容查询相关的目标概率。

pairs.src: This way, dynamic box coordinates used as object queries provide better prediction, making the training convergence faster and increasing detection results for small objects.
pairs.tgt: 这样，用作目标查询的动态边界框坐标提供了更好的预测，使训练收敛更快，并提升了小目标的检测结果。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.18. DN-DETR

pairs.src: DN-DETR
pairs.tgt: DN-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.18. DN-DETR

pairs.src: DN-DETR [35] uses noised object queries as an additional decoder input to reduce the instability of the bipartite-matching mechanism in DETR, which causes the slow convergence problem.
pairs.tgt: DN-DETR [35]使用加噪的目标查询作为解码器的额外输入，以降低DETR中二分匹配机制的不稳定性，该不稳定性导致了收敛缓慢的问题。

pairs.src: In Figure 8, the dark green block indicates DN-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 8中，深绿色方块表示DN-DETR。

pairs.src: The decoder queries have two parts: the denoising part, containing noised ground-truth box-label pairs as input, and the matching part, containing learnable anchors as input.
pairs.tgt: 解码器查询包含两部分：去噪部分，包含加噪的真实标注框-标签对作为输入；匹配部分，包含可学习的锚点作为输入。

pairs.src: The matching part $M = \left\{ M _ { 0 } , M _ { 1 } , \dots , M _ { l - 1 } \right\}$ determines the resemblance between the ground-truth label pairs and the decoder output, while the denoising part $d = \{ d _ { 0 } , d _ { 1 } , \dotsc , d _ { k - 1 } \}$ attempts to reconstruct the ground-truth objects as follows:
pairs.tgt: 匹配部分$M = \left\{ M _ { 0 } , M _ { 1 } , \dots , M _ { l - 1 } \right\}$确定真实标注标签对与解码器输出之间的相似性，而去噪部分$d = \{ d _ { 0 } , d _ { 1 } , \dotsc , d _ { k - 1 } \}$尝试如下重构真实标注目标：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.18. DN-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.18. DN-DETR

pairs.src: where I is the image features taken as input from the transformer encoder, and A is the attention mask that stops the information transfer between the matching and denoising parts and among different noised levels of the same ground-truth objects.
pairs.tgt: 其中I是从Transformer编码器输入中获取的图像特征，A是阻止匹配部分与去噪部分之间以及同一真实标注对象不同噪声级别之间信息传递的注意力掩码。

pairs.src: The decoder has noised levels of ground-truth objects where noise is added to bounding boxes and class labels, such as label flipping.
pairs.tgt: 解码器包含真实标注对象的噪声级别，其中对边界框和类别标签添加噪声，例如标签翻转。

pairs.src: It contains a hyperparameter λ for controlling the noise level.
pairs.tgt: 它包含一个超参数λ用于控制噪声级别。

pairs.src: The training architecture of DN-DETR is based on DAB-DETR, as it also takes bounding box coordinates as object queries.
pairs.tgt: DN-DETR的训练架构基于DAB-DETR，因为它同样将边界框坐标作为目标查询。

pairs.src: The only difference between these two architectures is the class label indicator as an additional input in the decoder to assist label denoising.
pairs.tgt: 这两种架构之间唯一的区别是类别标签指示器作为解码器中的额外输入以辅助标签去噪。

pairs.src: The bounding boxes are updated inconsistently in DAB-DETR, making relative offset learning challenging.
pairs.tgt: 在DAB-DETR中边界框的更新方式不一致，使得相对偏移学习具有挑战性。

pairs.src: The denoising training mechanism in DN-DETR improves performance and training convergence.
pairs.tgt: DN-DETR中的去噪训练机制提升了性能和训练收敛速度。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: AdaMixer
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: AdaMixer [36] considers the encoder an extra network between the backbone and decoder that limits the performance and slows the training convergence because of its design complexity.
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer [36]将编码器视为骨干网络与解码器之间的额外网络，由于其设计复杂性，该网络限制了性能并减缓了训练收敛。

pairs.src: AdaMixer provides a detection transformer network without an encoder.
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer提供了一种无需编码器的检测Transformer网络。

pairs.src: In Figure 8, the light green box represents AdaMixer.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 8中，浅绿色方块表示AdaMixer。

pairs.src: The main modules of AdaMixer are explained as follows.
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer的主要模块说明如下。

pairs.src: Three-dimensional feature space: For the 3D feature space, the input feature map from the CNN backbone with the downsampling stride $s _ { i } ^ { f }$ is first transformed by a linear layer to the same $d _ { f }$ channel and computed the coordinate of its z-axis as follows:
pairs.tgt: 三维特征空间：对于三维特征空间，来自CNN骨干网络的输入特征图（下采样步长为$s _ { i } ^ { f }$）首先通过线性层转换为相同的$d _ { f }$通道，并计算其z轴坐标如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: where the height $h _ { i }$ and width $w _ { i }$ of feature maps (different strides) is rescaled to $h _ { i } / s _ { b }$ and $w _ { i } / s _ { b } ,$ , where $s _ { b } = 4$ Three-dimensional feature-sampling process: In the sampling process, the query generates $I _ { p }$ groups of vectors to $I _ { p }$ points, $( \Delta x _ { j } , \Delta y _ { j } , \Delta z _ { j } ) I _ { p } ,$ , where each vector is dependent on its content vector $q _ { i }$ by a linear layer $L _ { i }$ as follows:
pairs.tgt: 其中特征图的高度$h _ { i }$和宽度$w _ { i }$（不同步长）被重新缩放为$h _ { i } / s _ { b }$和$w _ { i } / s _ { b } ,$，其中$s _ { b } = 4$三维特征采样过程：在采样过程中，查询生成$I _ { p }$组向量对应$I _ { p }$个采样点，$( \Delta x _ { j } , \Delta y _ { j } , \Delta z _ { j } ) I _ { p } ,$，其中每个向量通过线性层$L _ { i }$依赖于其内容向量$q _ { i }$如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: These offset values are converted into sampling positions with regard to the position vector of the object query as follows:
pairs.tgt: 这些偏移值相对于目标查询的位置向量转换为采样位置如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: The interpolation over the 3D feature space first samples by bilinear interpolation in the $\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } \right)$ space and then interpolates on the z-axis by Gaussian weighting, where the weight for the i-th feature map is as follows:
pairs.tgt: 在三维特征空间上的插值首先在$\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } \right)$空间中通过双线性插值进行采样，然后在z轴上通过高斯加权进行插值，其中第i个特征图的权重如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: where $\Gamma _ { z }$ is the softening coefficient used to interpolate values over the z-axis $( \Gamma _ { z } = 2 )$ This process makes decoder detection learning easier by taking feature samples according to the query.
pairs.tgt: 其中$\Gamma _ { z }$是用于在z轴$( \Gamma _ { z } = 2 )$上插值的平滑系数。该过程通过根据查询进行特征采样，使解码器的检测学习更加容易。

pairs.src: AdaMixer Decoder: The decoder module in AdaMixer takes a content vector $q _ { i }$ and positional vector $\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , z _ { i } , r _ { i } \right)$ as input object queries.
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer解码器：AdaMixer中的解码器模块接收内容向量$q _ { i }$和位置向量$\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , z _ { i } , r _ { i } \right)$作为输入目标查询。

pairs.src: The position-aware multi-head selfattention is applied between these queries as follows:
pairs.tgt: 在这些查询之间应用位置感知多头自注意力如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.19. AdaMixer

pairs.src: where $X _ { k l } = l o g ( | b o x _ { k } \cap b o x _ { l } / | b o x _ { k } | + \epsilon ) , \epsilon = 1 0 ^ { - 7 } .$ .
pairs.tgt: 其中$X _ { k l } = l o g ( | b o x _ { k } \cap b o x _ { l } / | b o x _ { k } | + \epsilon ) , \epsilon = 1 0 ^ { - 7 } .$。

pairs.src: The $X _ { k l } = 0$ indicates the boxk is inside the $b o x _ { l }$ and $X _ { k l } = l$ represents no overlapping between bo ${ { x } _ { k } }$ and boxl.
pairs.tgt: $X _ { k l } = 0$表示boxk位于$b o x _ { l }$和$X _ { k l } = l$内部，$X _ { k l } = l$表示box${ { x } _ { k } }$和boxl之间无重叠。

pairs.src: This position vector is updated at every stage of the decoder network.
pairs.tgt: 该位置向量在解码器网络的每一阶段都会更新。

pairs.src: The AdaMixer decoder module takes a content vector and a positional vector as input object queries.
pairs.tgt: AdaMixer解码器模块接收内容向量和位置向量作为输入目标查询。

pairs.src: For this, multi-scale features taken from the CNN backbone are converted into a 3D feature space, as the decoder should consider $\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } \right)$ space as well as be adjustable in terms of scales of detected objects.
pairs.tgt: 为此，从CNN骨干网络获取的多尺度特征被转换为三维特征空间，因为解码器需要考虑$\left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } \right)$空间，同时应能适配检测目标的尺度变化。

pairs.src: It takes the sampled features from this feature space as input.
pairs.tgt: 它将该特征空间中的采样特征作为输入。

pairs.src: It applies the AdaMixer mechanism to provide final predictions of input queries without using an encoder network to reduce the computational complexity of detection transformers.
pairs.tgt: 它应用AdaMixer机制提供输入查询的最终预测，而无需使用编码器网络，以降低检测Transformer的计算复杂度。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: REGO-DETR
pairs.tgt: REGO-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: REGO-DETR [37] proposes an RoI-based method for detection refinement to improve the attention mechanism in DETR.
pairs.tgt: REGO-DETR [37]提出了一种基于RoI的检测细化方法，以改进DETR中的注意力机制。

pairs.src: In Figure 9, the purple color block denotes REGO-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 9中，紫色色块表示REGO-DETR。

pairs.src: It contains two main modules: a multi-level recurrent mechanism and a glimpse-based decoder.
pairs.tgt: 它包含两个主要模块：多层循环机制和基于视觉注意的解码器。

pairs.src: In the multi-level recurrent mechanism, bounding boxes detected in the previous level are considered to get glimpse features.
pairs.tgt: 在多层循环机制中，前一层级检测到的边界框被用于获取视觉注意特征。

pairs.src: These are converted into refined attention using earlier attention in describing objects.
pairs.tgt: 这些特征利用早期注意力转换为描述目标的细化注意力。

pairs.src: The k-th processing level is as follows:
pairs.tgt: 第k个处理层级如下：

Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: where $O _ { c l a s s } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { M _ { d } \times M _ { c } }$ and $O _ { b b o x } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { M _ { d } \times 4 }$ .
pairs.tgt: 其中$O _ { c l a s s } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { M _ { d } \times M _ { c } }$，$O _ { b b o x } \in \mathbb { R } ^ { M _ { d } \times 4 }$。

pairs.src: Here, $M _ { d }$ and $M _ { c }$ represent the total number of predicted objects and classes, respectively.
pairs.tgt: 此处，$M _ { d }$和$M _ { c }$分别表示预测目标和类别的总数。

pairs.src: $D F _ { c l a s s }$ and $D F _ { b b o x }$ are functions that convert the input features into desired outputs.
pairs.tgt: $D F _ { c l a s s }$和$D F _ { b b o x }$是将输入特征转换为所需输出的函数。

pairs.src: $H _ { d e } ( k )$ is the attention of this level after decoding as follows:
pairs.tgt: $H _ { d e } ( k )$是该层级解码后的注意力，如下所示：

Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: where $H _ { g m } ( k )$ refers to the glimpse features according to $H _ { d e } ( k - 1 )$ and previous levels.
pairs.tgt: 其中$H _ { g m } ( k )$指根据$H _ { d e } ( k - 1 )$及先前层级的视觉注意特征。

pairs.src: These glimpse features are transformed using multi-head cross-attention into refined attention outputs according to previous attention outputs as follows:
pairs.tgt: 这些视觉注意特征通过多头交叉注意力根据先前的注意力输出转换为细化注意力输出，如下所示：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: For extracting glimpse features $V ( k )$ , the following operation is performed:
pairs.tgt: 为提取视觉注意特征$V ( k )$，执行以下操作：

Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.20. REGO-DETR

pairs.src: where $F E _ { e x t }$ is the feature extraction function, $\alpha ( k )$ is a scalar parameter, and RI is the RoI computation.
pairs.tgt: 其中$F E _ { e x t }$是特征提取函数，$\alpha ( k )$是标量参数，RI是RoI计算。

pairs.src: In this way, region of interest (RoI)-based refinement modules make the training convergence of the detection transformer faster and provide better performance.
pairs.tgt: 通过这种方式，基于感兴趣区域（RoI）的细化模块使检测Transformer的训练收敛更快，并提供更好的性能。

pairs.src: The structure of the original DETR after the addition of REGO-DETR [37] and DINO [38].
pairs.tgt: 添加REGO-DETR [37]和DINO [38]后原始DETR的结构。

pairs.src: Here, the network is a simple DETR network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
pairs.tgt: 此处，网络为简单的DETR网络，改进部分以小彩色方块标示。

pairs.src: The purple color block indicates REGO-DETR and the red indicator block represents DINO.
pairs.tgt: 紫色色块表示REGO-DETR，红色指示块表示DINO。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.21. DINO

pairs.src: DINO
pairs.tgt: DINO

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.21. DINO

pairs.src: DN-DETR adds positive noise to the anchors taken as object queries to the input of the decoder and provides labels to only those anchors with ground-truth objects nearby.
pairs.tgt: DN-DETR对作为目标查询输入解码器的锚点添加正噪声，并仅为附近存在真实标注对象的锚点提供标签。

pairs.src: Following DAB-DETR and DN-DETR, DINO [38] proposes a mixed object query selection method for anchor initialization and a look forward twice mechanism for box prediction.
pairs.tgt: 继DAB-DETR和DN-DETR之后，DINO [38]提出了一种用于锚点初始化的混合目标查询选择方法和用于边界框预测的两次前向查找机制。

pairs.src: It provides the contrastive denoising (CDN) module, which takes positional queries as anchor boxes and adds additional DN loss.
pairs.tgt: 它提供了对比去噪（CDN）模块，该模块将位置查询作为锚框并添加额外的去噪损失。

pairs.src: In Figure 9, the red block indicates DINO.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 9中，红色方块表示DINO。

pairs.src: This detector uses $\lambda _ { 1 }$ and $\lambda _ { 2 }$ hyperparameters where $\lambda _ { 1 } < \lambda _ { 2 }$ .
pairs.tgt: 该检测器使用$\lambda _ { 1 }$和$\lambda _ { 2 }$超参数，其中$\lambda _ { 1 } < \lambda _ { 2 }$。

pairs.src: The bounding box $\boldsymbol { b } = \left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , w _ { i } , h _ { i } \right)$ taken as input in the decoder, its corresponding generated anchor is denoted as $a = \left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , w _ { i } , h _ { i } \right)$
pairs.tgt: 边界框$\boldsymbol { b } = \left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , w _ { i } , h _ { i } \right)$作为解码器的输入，其对应生成的锚点记为$a = \left( x _ { i } , y _ { i } , w _ { i } , h _ { i } \right)$

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.21. DINO
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.21. DINO

pairs.src: where $\parallel \left( b _ { i } - a _ { i } \right) \ |$ is the distance between the anchor and bounding box, and $M _ { K } ( { \boldsymbol { x } } , { \boldsymbol { k } } )$ is the function that provides the top K elements in x. The λ parameter is the threshold value for generating noise for anchors that are fed as input object queries to the decoder.
pairs.tgt: 其中$\parallel \left( b _ { i } - a _ { i } \right) \ |$是锚点与边界框之间的距离，$M _ { K } ( { \boldsymbol { x } } , { \boldsymbol { k } } )$是提供x中前K个元素的函数。λ参数是为作为输入目标查询馈入解码器的锚点生成噪声的阈值。

pairs.src: It provides two types of anchor queries: positive with threshold value less than $\lambda _ { 1 }$ and negative with noise threshold values greater than $\lambda _ { 1 }$ and less than $\lambda _ { 2 }$ .
pairs.tgt: 它提供两种类型的锚点查询：正样本，其阈值小于$\lambda _ { 1 }$；负样本，其噪声阈值大于$\lambda _ { 1 }$且小于$\lambda _ { 2 }$。

pairs.src: This way, the anchors with no ground-truth nearby are labeled as “no object”.
pairs.tgt: 这样，附近没有真实标注的锚点被标记为"无目标"。

pairs.src: Thus, DINO makes the training convergence faster and improves performance for small objects.
pairs.tgt: 因此，DINO使训练收敛更快，并提升了小目标的性能。

pairs.src: DINOv2 [222] is a self-supervised vision transformer model developed by Meta AI.
pairs.tgt: DINOv2 [222]是由Meta AI开发的自监督视觉Transformer模型。

pairs.src: It was trained on a large-scale dataset of 142 million images without any labels or annotations.
pairs.tgt: 它在包含1.42亿张图像的大规模数据集上进行训练，无需任何标签或标注。

pairs.src: DINOv2 [222] produces high-performance visual features that can be directly employed with classifiers as simple as linear layers on a variety of computer vision tasks.
pairs.tgt: DINOv2 [222]生成高性能的视觉特征，可直接与简单分类器（如线性层）配合使用，应用于多种计算机视觉任务。

pairs.src: These visual features are robust and perform well across domains without any requirement for fine-tuning.
pairs.tgt: 这些视觉特征具有鲁棒性，在不同领域之间表现良好，无需微调。

pairs.src: DINOv3 [223], also developed by Meta AI, is the third generation of the DINO framework.
pairs.tgt: DINOv3 [223]同样由Meta AI开发，是DINO框架的第三代版本。

pairs.src: It is a 7-billion-parameter Vision Transformer trained on 1.7 billion images without labels.
pairs.tgt: 它是一个拥有70亿参数的视觉Transformer，在1.7十亿张无标签图像上进行训练。

pairs.src: DINOv3 [223] introduces several innovations, including Gram anchoring, which stabilizes dense feature maps during training, and axial RoPE (Rotary Positional Embeddings) with jittering, which enhances the model’s robustness to varying image resolutions, scales, and aspect ratios.
pairs.tgt: DINOv3 [223]引入了多项创新，包括在训练期间稳定密集特征图的Gram锚定，以及通过抖动增强的轴向RoPE（旋转位置编码），提升了模型对不同图像分辨率、尺度和宽高比的鲁棒性。

pairs.src: These advancements enable DINOv3 [223] to achieve state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of vision tasks, including object detection, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation.
pairs.tgt: 这些进展使DINOv3 [223]在目标检测、语义分割和深度估计等广泛的视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.22. Co-DETR

pairs.src: Co-DETR
pairs.tgt: Co-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.22. Co-DETR

pairs.src: Co-DETR [39] is an improvement over DETR that addresses a key limitation of the standard one-to-one label assignment, which in DETR restricts each ground-truth object to a single predicted query.
pairs.tgt: Co-DETR [39]是对DETR的改进，解决了标准一对一标签分配的一个关键限制，即在DETR中将每个真实标注对象限制为单个预测查询。

pairs.src: In Figure 10, the light red block indicates Co-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 10中，浅红色方块表示Co-DETR。

pairs.src: This design leads to a few positive samples during training, leaving many decoder queries unused and slowing gradient flow, particularly in the early stages of learning.
pairs.tgt: 这种设计导致训练期间正样本数量很少，许多解码器查询未被利用，梯度流动缓慢，尤其在学习初期。

pairs.src: Co-DETR overcomes this by introducing a collaborative hybrid assignment strategy that combines the original one-to-one assignment with a one-to-many assignment implemented through auxiliary heads.
pairs.tgt: Co-DETR通过引入协作混合分配策略克服了这一问题，该策略将原始的一对一分配与通过辅助头实现的一对多分配相结合。

pairs.src: The one-to-one assignment preserves the unique matching of each object, maintaining the stability and structure of DETR’s training.
pairs.tgt: 一对一分配保持了每个对象的唯一匹配，维持了DETR训练的稳定性和结构。

pairs.src: The one-to-many assignment leverages heuristics from classical object detectors, such as ATSS or Faster R-CNN, to assign multiple predicted queries to the same ground-truth object, providing denser supervision for both the encoder and decoder.
pairs.tgt: 一对多分配利用经典目标检测器（如ATSS或Faster R-CNN）的启发式方法，将多个预测查询分配给同一真实标注对象，为编码器和解码器提供更密集的监督。

pairs.src: The auxiliary heads are only active during training and are discarded during inference, ensuring no additional computational cost at test time.
pairs.tgt: 辅助头仅在训练期间活跃，在推理时被丢弃，确保测试时不增加额外计算成本。

pairs.src: The total training loss is expressed as follows:
pairs.tgt: 总训练损失表示如下：

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.22. Co-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.22. Co-DETR

pairs.src: where LDET is the standard DETR loss and $L _ { \mathrm { a u x } , h }$ represents the one-to-many assignment loss from each auxiliary head.
pairs.tgt: 其中LDET是标准DETR损失，$L _ { \mathrm { a u x } , h }$表示每个辅助头的一对多分配损失。

pairs.src: This hybrid assignment improves gradient flow by increasing the number of positive samples per batch, enhances encoder supervision through additional feedback signals, and leads to better detection performance on benchmarks such as COCO and LVIS.
pairs.tgt: 这种混合分配通过增加每批正样本数量改善梯度流动，通过额外反馈信号增强编码器监督，并在COCO和LVIS等基准上获得更好的检测性能。

pairs.src: By enriching training supervision without altering the inference process, Co-DETR enables faster convergence, more effective learning, and higher accuracy in DETRbased object detectors.
pairs.tgt: 通过在不改变推理过程的情况下丰富训练监督，Co-DETR实现了更快的收敛、更有效的学习以及基于DETR的目标检测器更高的精度。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.22. Co-DETR

pairs.src: ![](Images_GFP684MN/d02651a8844595ff0e89226c712f509c9644f1df46a487bdd3f97671c2cea1fc.jpg) Figure 10.
pairs.tgt: ![](Images_GFP684MN/d02651a8844595ff0e89226c712f509c9644f1df46a487bdd3f97671c2cea1fc.jpg) Figure 10。

pairs.src: The structure of the original DETR after the addition of Co-DETR [37], RT-DETR, and LW-DETR [38].
pairs.tgt: 添加Co-DETR [37]、RT-DETR和LW-DETR [38]后原始DETR的结构。

pairs.src: Here, the network is a simple DETR network, along with improvement indicated with small colored boxes.
pairs.tgt: 此处，网络为简单的DETR网络，改进部分以小彩色方块标示。

pairs.src: The light red indicator block represents Co-DETR, blue color block indicates LW-DETR, and the purple color block indicates RT-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 浅红色指示块表示Co-DETR，蓝色色块表示LW-DETR，紫色色块表示RT-DETR。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.23. LW-DETR

pairs.src: LW-DETR
pairs.tgt: LW-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.23. LW-DETR

pairs.src: LW-DETR [40] is a lightweight, transformer-based object detection model designed for high accuracy and real-time performance.
pairs.tgt: LW-DETR [40]是一种轻量级的基于Transformer的目标检测模型，旨在实现高精度和实时性能。

pairs.src: It streamlines the standard DETR architecture by using an optimized vision transformer (ViT) encoder and a shallow decoder.
pairs.tgt: 它通过使用优化的视觉Transformer（ViT）编码器和浅层解码器简化了标准DETR架构。

pairs.src: The model first processes an input image by breaking it into patches and extracting features through the encoder.
pairs.tgt: 模型首先将输入图像分割为图像块，并通过编码器提取特征。

pairs.src: These features are then refined via a convolutional projection layer before being passed to the decoder, which uses a set of object queries to predict bounding boxes and class labels.
pairs.tgt: 这些特征随后通过卷积投影层进行细化，然后传入解码器，解码器使用一组目标查询预测边界框和类别标签。

pairs.src: In Figure 10, the blue block indicates LW-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 10中，蓝色方块表示LW-DETR。

pairs.src: LW-DETR further improves efficiency through several strategies: interleaved window and global attention reduce the complexity of self-attention, multi-level feature aggregation captures richer representations, and window-major feature map organization optimizes attention computation.
pairs.tgt: LW-DETR通过多种策略进一步提升效率：交错窗口注意力和全局注意力降低了自注意力的复杂度，多层特征聚合捕获了更丰富的表示，窗口为主的特征图组织优化了注意力计算。

pairs.src: During training, the model employs deformable cross-attention to focus on relevant regions, IoUaware classification loss to enhance localization accuracy, and encoder–decoder pre-training to learn robust features.
pairs.tgt: 在训练期间，模型采用可变形交叉注意力聚焦于相关区域，IoU感知分类损失增强定位精度，编码器-解码器预训练学习鲁棒特征。

pairs.src: The total training loss combines classification, bounding box regression, and IoU losses to guide learning effectively.
pairs.tgt: 总训练损失结合了分类损失、边界框回归损失和IoU损失以有效指导学习。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.23. LW-DETR
Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.23. LW-DETR

pairs.src: where $L _ { \mathrm { c l s } }$ is the classification loss, $L _ { \mathrm { b o x } }$ is the bounding box regression loss, $L _ { \mathrm { G I o U } }$ is the generalized intersection over union loss, and $\lambda _ { \mathrm { g i o u } }$ balances the contributions of the losses.
pairs.tgt: 其中$L _ { \mathrm { c l s } }$是分类损失，$L _ { \mathrm { b o x } }$是边界框回归损失，$L _ { \mathrm { G I o U } }$是广义交并比损失，$\lambda _ { \mathrm { g i o u } }$平衡各损失的贡献。

pairs.src: Experimental results show that LW-DETR achieves higher accuracy than many real-time detectors, including YOLO variants, while maintaining low computational cost, making it suitable for real-time object detection tasks.
pairs.tgt: 实验结果表明，LW-DETR在保持较低计算成本的同时，实现了比许多实时检测器（包括YOLO变体）更高的精度，适用于实时目标检测任务。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.24. RT-DETR

pairs.src: RT-DETR
pairs.tgt: RT-DETR

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 3.24. RT-DETR

pairs.src: An RT-DETR [41] (real-time detection transformer) is a transformer-based object detection model developed by Baidu, designed for high-speed, end-to-end inference suitable for real-time applications.
pairs.tgt: RT-DETR [41]（实时检测Transformer）是由百度开发的基于Transformer的目标检测模型，专为适用于实时应用的高速端到端推理而设计。

pairs.src: In Figure 10, the purple block indicates RT-DETR.
pairs.tgt: 在Figure 10中，紫色方块表示RT-DETR。

pairs.src: The model employs a hybrid encoder that processes multi-scale features by decoupling intra-scale interactions and cross-scale feature fusion.
pairs.tgt: 该模型采用混合编码器，通过解耦尺度内交互和跨尺度特征融合来处理多尺度特征。

pairs.src: This efficient design reduces computational costs while retaining rich feature representations.
pairs.tgt: 这种高效设计在保留丰富特征表示的同时降低了计算成本。

pairs.src: The encoder outputs multi-scale feature maps, which are then passed to a DETR-style decoder.
pairs.tgt: 编码器输出多尺度特征图，然后传入DETR风格的解码器。

pairs.src: An IoU-aware query selection mechanism is utilized to focus on the most relevant object queries, enhancing detection accuracy.
pairs.tgt: 利用IoU感知查询选择机制聚焦于最相关的目标查询，提升检测精度。

pairs.src: Additionally, the inference speed can be adjusted by changing the number of decoder layers, allowing for flexible deployment across different real-time scenarios.
pairs.tgt: 此外，推理速度可通过改变解码器层数进行调整，允许在不同实时场景中灵活部署。

pairs.src: Subsequent versions build upon this foundation to further enhance performance.
pairs.tgt: 后续版本在此基础上进一步提升性能。

pairs.src: RT-DETRv2 [224] introduces selective multi-scale sampling and replaces the grid-sample operator with a discrete sampling operator, improving the detection of objects at different scales.
pairs.tgt: RT-DETRv2 [224]引入了选择性多尺度采样，并用离散采样算子替代网格采样算子，改善了对不同尺度目标的检测。

pairs.src: It also employs dynamic data augmentation and scale-adaptive hyperparameter tuning to enhance training efficiency without increasing inference latency.
pairs.tgt: 它还采用动态数据增强和尺度自适应超参数调优，在不增加推理延迟的情况下提升训练效率。

pairs.src: RT-DETRv3 [225] addresses limitations of sparse supervision and insufficient decoder training by adding a CNN-based auxiliary branch for dense supervision, a self-attention perturbation strategy to diversify label assignment, and a shared-weight decoder branch for dense positive supervision.
pairs.tgt: RT-DETRv3 [225]通过添加基于CNN的辅助分支实现密集监督、自注意力扰动策略实现多样化标签分配，以及共享权重解码器分支实现密集正样本监督，解决了稀疏监督和解码器训练不足的问题。

pairs.src: In summary, the RT-DETR series demonstrates a clear evolution in real-time object detection, with each version introducing architectural and training innovations that enhance both speed and accuracy.
pairs.tgt: 总而言之，RT-DETR系列展示了实时目标检测的清晰演进，每个版本都引入了提升速度和精度的架构和训练创新。

pairs.src: The original RT-DETR establishes the foundation for real-time performance, while v2 and v3 progressively improve detection capability without compromising inference efficiency.
pairs.tgt: 原始RT-DETR奠定了实时性能的基础，而v2和v3在不牺牲推理效率的情况下逐步提升了检测能力。

pairs.src: It is important to compare modifications in detection transformers to understand their effect on network size, training convergence, and performance.
pairs.tgt: 比较检测Transformer中的改进以理解其对网络规模、训练收敛和性能的影响至关重要。

pairs.src: In this work, we use the COCO2014 mini validation set (minival) as a benchmark, since COCO is a widely accepted standard for evaluating object detection models [75].
pairs.tgt: 在本工作中，我们使用COCO2014 mini验证集（minival）作为基准，因为COCO是评估目标检测模型的广泛接受标准[75]。

pairs.src: All images are preprocessed using standard resizing and normalization procedures, and data augmentation, such as random horizontal flipping, is applied, consistent with typical DETR training protocols.
pairs.tgt: 所有图像使用标准调整大小和归一化程序进行预处理，并应用随机水平翻转等数据增强，与典型的DETR训练协议一致。

pairs.src: The performance of DETR and its variants is evaluated using mean average precision (mAP), calculated as the mean of each object category’s average precision (AP), where AP corresponds to the area under the precision–recall curve [226].
pairs.tgt: DETR及其变体的性能使用平均精度均值（mAP）进行评估，其计算方式为每个目标类别的平均精度（AP）的均值，其中AP对应精确率-召回率曲线下面积[226]。

pairs.src: Following the standard COCO evaluation protocol, objects are classified into three size categories based on pixel area: small $( < 3 2 ^ { 2 }$ pixels), medium $( 3 2 ^ { 2 } - 9 6 ^ { 2 }$ pixels), and large $( > 9 6 ^ { 2 }$ pixels).
pairs.tgt: 按照标准COCO评估协议，目标根据像素面积分为三个尺寸类别：小目标（$( < 3 2 ^ { 2 }$像素）、中等目标（$( 3 2 ^ { 2 } - 9 6 ^ { 2 }$像素）和大目标（$( > 9 6 ^ { 2 }$像素）。

pairs.src: This categorization allows for detailed analysis across object scales, with $\mathrm { A P } _ { \mathrm { S } } , \mathrm { A P } _ { \mathrm { M } } .$ , and $\mathrm { A P _ { L } }$ reporting performance for small, medium, and large objects, respectively.
pairs.tgt: 这种分类允许对不同目标尺度进行详细分析，其中$\mathrm { A P } _ { \mathrm { S } } , \mathrm { A P } _ { \mathrm { M } } .$、$\mathrm { A P _ { L } }$分别报告小目标、中等目标和大目标的性能。

pairs.src: For a fair comparison, all results are obtained by loading the original pre-trained PTH files released by the respective authors and validating them on the COCO minival set.
pairs.tgt: 为公平比较，所有结果通过加载各作者发布的原始预训练PTH文件并在COCO minival集上验证获得。

pairs.src: This approach allows us to reproduce the reported performance of each model while focusing on the architectural differences and improvements introduced by various DETR variants.
pairs.tgt: 这种方法使我们能够复现各模型的报告性能，同时聚焦于各种DETR变体引入的架构差异和改进。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 4. Results and Discussion

pairs.src: Results and Discussion
pairs.tgt: 结果与讨论

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 4. Results and Discussion

pairs.src: Many advancements are proposed in DETR, such as backbone modification, query design, and attention refinement to improve performance and training convergence.
pairs.tgt: DETR中提出了许多改进，如骨干网络修改、查询设计和注意力细化，以提升性能和训练收敛。

pairs.src: Table 3 shows the performance comparison of all DETR-based detection transformers on the COCO minival set.
pairs.tgt: Table 3展示了所有基于DETR的检测Transformer在COCO minival集上的性能比较。

pairs.src: We can observe that DETR performs well at 500 training epochs and has low AP on small objects.
pairs.tgt: 我们可以观察到，DETR在500个训练周期时表现良好，但在小目标上的AP较低。

pairs.src: The modified versions improve performance and training convergence, like DINO, which has an mAP of 49.0% at 12 epochs and performs well on small objects.
pairs.tgt: 改进版本提升了性能和训练收敛，如DINO在12个周期时mAP达到49.0%，且在小目标上表现良好。

pairs.src: The quantitative analysis of DETR and its updated versions regarding training convergence and model size on the COCO minival set is performed.
pairs.tgt: 对DETR及其更新版本在COCO minival集上的训练收敛性和模型规模进行了定量分析。

pairs.src: Left side of Figure 11 shows the mAP of the detection transformers using a ResNet-50 backbone with training epochs.
pairs.tgt: Figure 11左侧展示了使用ResNet-50骨干网络的检测Transformer的mAP随训练周期的变化。

pairs.src: The original DETR, represented with a brown line, has low training convergence.
pairs.tgt: 原始DETR以棕色线表示，训练收敛较低。

pairs.src: It has an mAP value of 35.3% at 50 training epochs and 44.9 % at 500 training epochs.
pairs.tgt: 它在50个训练周期时mAP值为35.3%，在500个训练周期时为44.9 %。

pairs.src: Here, DINO, represented with a red line, converges at low training epochs and gives the highest mAP on all epoch values.
pairs.tgt: 此处，DINO以红色线表示，在较低训练周期时收敛，并在所有周期值上给出最高mAP。

pairs.src: The attention mechanism in DETR involves computing pairwise attention scores between every pair of feature vectors, which can be computationally expensive, especially for large input images.
pairs.tgt: DETR中的注意力机制涉及计算每对特征向量之间的成对注意力分数，计算成本较高，尤其对于大输入图像。

pairs.src: Moreover, the self-attention mechanism in DETR relies on using fixed positional encodings to encode the spatial relationships between the different parts of the input image.
pairs.tgt: 此外，DETR中的自注意力机制依赖使用固定位置编码来编码输入图像不同部分之间的空间关系。

pairs.src: This can slow down the training process and increase convergence time.
pairs.tgt: 这可能减慢训练过程并增加收敛时间。

pairs.src: In contrast, Deformable-DETR and DINO have some modifications that can help speed up the training process.
pairs.tgt: 相比之下，Deformable-DETR和DINO进行了一些有助于加速训练过程的改进。

pairs.src: For example, Deformable DETR introduces deformable attention layers, which can better capture spatial context information and improve object detection accuracy.
pairs.tgt: 例如，Deformable-DETR引入了可变形注意力层，能更好地捕获空间上下文信息并提升目标检测精度。

pairs.src: Similarly, DINO uses a denoising learning approach to train the network to learn more generalized features useful for object detection, making the training process faster and more effective.
pairs.tgt: 类似地，DINO使用去噪学习方法训练网络学习对目标检测更有用的泛化特征，使训练过程更快更有效。

pairs.src: Right side of Figure 11 compares all detection transformers regarding the model size.
pairs.tgt: Figure 11右侧比较了所有检测Transformer的模型规模。

pairs.src: Here, YOLOS-DETR uses DeiT-small as the backbone instead of DeiT-Ti, but it also increases the model size by 20x times.
pairs.tgt: 此处，YOLOS-DETR使用DeiT-small作为骨干网络替代DeiT-Ti，但也使模型规模增加了20倍。

pairs.src: DINO and REGO-DETR have comparable mAP, but REGO-DETR is nearly double the model size of DINO.
pairs.tgt: DINO和REGO-DETR具有可比的mAP，但REGO-DETR的模型规模几乎是DINO的两倍。

pairs.src: These networks use more complex architectures than the original DETR architecture, which increases the total parameters and the overall network size.
pairs.tgt: 这些网络使用了比原始DETR架构更复杂的架构，增加了总参数量和整体网络规模。

pairs.src: We also provide a qualitative analysis of DETR and its updated versions on all-sized objects in Figure 12.
pairs.tgt: 我们还在Figure 12中提供了DETR及其更新版本在所有尺寸目标上的定性分析。

pairs.src: For small objects, the mAP for the original DETR is 15.2% at 50 epochs, while Deformable-DETR has an mAP value of 26.4% at 50 epochs.
pairs.tgt: 对于小目标，原始DETR在50个周期时的mAP为15.2%，而Deformable-DETR在50个周期时的mAP值为26.4%。

pairs.src: The self-attention mechanism in Deformable-DETR allows it to interpolate features from neighboring pixels, which is particularly useful for small objects that may only occupy a few pixels in an image.
pairs.tgt: Deformable-DETR中的自注意力机制使其能够从邻近像素插值特征，这对于可能仅占图像中几个像素的小目标特别有用。

pairs.src: This mechanism in Deformable-DETR captures more precise and detailed information about small objects, which can lead to better performance than DETR.
pairs.tgt: Deformable-DETR中的这种机制捕获了关于小目标更精确和详细的信息，可能带来比DETR更好的性能。

pairs.src: Comparison of DETR-based detection transformers on the COCO minival set using a ResNet-50 backbone. left Performance comparison of detection transformers on small objects. middle Performance comparison of detection transformers on medium objects. right Performance comparison of detection transformers on large objects.
pairs.tgt: 在 COCO minival 集合上使用 ResNet-50 骨干网络对基于 DETR 的检测 Transformer 进行比较。左图：检测 Transformer 在小目标上的性能比较。中图：检测 Transformer 在中等目标上的性能比较。右图：检测 Transformer 在大目标上的性能比较。

pairs.src: While DINO demonstrates impressive accuracy and fast convergence, its computational footprint remains a significant concern.
pairs.tgt: 尽管 DINO 展现了令人瞩目的精度和快速收敛能力，但其计算开销仍然是一个重大问题。

pairs.src: With approximately 860 GFLOPs per inference, DINO is far more demanding than lightweight alternatives such as Nano YOLO variants, which typically operate in the range of 5–10 GFLOPs.
pairs.tgt: DINO 每次推理约需 5–10 GFLOPs，远比 Nano YOLO 变体等轻量级替代方案的计算需求更高，后者通常在 5–10 GFLOPs 范围内运行。

pairs.src: This stark difference highlights a fundamental limitation of many DETR-based models: despite their accuracy gains, their inference cost makes them impractical for latency-critical or resource-constrained applications.
pairs.tgt: 这一显著差异凸显了许多基于 DETR 模型的一个根本性局限：尽管精度有所提升，但其推理成本使其不适用于对延迟敏感或资源受限的应用场景。

pairs.src: In contrast, RT-DETR and LW-DETR provide lightweight and real-time DETR variants, achieving competitive accuracy with a substantially lower computational load (136–259 GFLOPs for RT-DETR and 67.7 GFLOPs for LW-DETR).
pairs.tgt: 相比之下，RT-DETR 和 LW-DETR 提供了轻量级和实时的 DETR 变体，以显著更低的计算负荷实现了有竞争力的精度（RT-DETR 为 136–259 GFLOPs，LW-DETR 为 67.7 GFLOPs）。

pairs.src: Additionally, Co-DETR focuses on enhancing contextual reasoning to further boost detection performance, achieving very high AP scores, though at a higher computational cost similar to DINO.
pairs.tgt: 此外，Co-DETR 专注于增强上下文推理以进一步提升检测性能，取得了非常高的 AP 分数，但其计算成本与 DINO 相当，同样较高。

pairs.src: Thus, future research must address not only accuracy and convergence speed but also the efficiency gap that separates DETR variants from lightweight CNN-based detectors, ensuring their practical applicability in real-world scenarios.
pairs.tgt: 因此，未来的研究不仅需要解决精度和收敛速度问题，还需要弥合 DETR 变体与轻量级基于 CNN 检测器之间的效率差距，以确保其在实际场景中的实际适用性。

pairs.src: While Table 3 and Figures 11 and 12 show performance improvements, it is also important to consider computational cost, memory footprint, and implementation complexity.
pairs.tgt: 虽然 Table 3 和图 11、图 12 展示了性能改进，但同样需要考虑计算成本、内存占用和实现复杂度。

pairs.src: Models like DINO and REGO achieve high mAP but require significantly more parameters and GFLOPs, making them less suitable for resource-constrained scenarios.
pairs.tgt: 诸如 DINO 和 REGO 等模型虽然取得了高 mAP，但需要显著更多的参数和 GFLOPs，使其不太适合资源受限的场景。

pairs.src: Deformable-DETR provides a balanced trade-off by improving small object detection and convergence speed without drastically increasing computational load.
pairs.tgt: Deformable-DETR 通过在不大幅增加计算负荷的情况下改进小目标检测和收敛速度，提供了均衡的折中方案。

pairs.src: YOLOS-DETR, while compact in design, relies on a transformer backbone (DeiT-S) that increases the memory requirement by up to 20×, highlighting a trade-off between model size and detection speed.
pairs.tgt: YOLOS-DETR 虽然设计紧凑，但依赖于 DeiT-S Transformer 骨干网络，使内存需求增加了高达 20 倍，凸显了模型规模与检测速度之间的折中。

pairs.src: Therefore, selecting a DETR variant depends not only on accuracy but also on hardware constraints, dataset characteristics, and real-time requirements.
pairs.tgt: 因此，选择 DETR 变体不仅取决于精度，还取决于硬件约束、数据集特性和实时性要求。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 5. Open Challenges and Future Directions

pairs.src: Open Challenges and Future Directions
pairs.tgt: 开放挑战与未来方向

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 5. Open Challenges and Future Directions

pairs.src: Detection transformers have shown promising results on various object detection benchmarks.
pairs.tgt: 检测 Transformer 在多种目标检测基准上展现了令人瞩目的结果。

pairs.src: However, several open challenges remain, providing directions for future improvements.
pairs.tgt: 然而，仍存在若干开放性挑战，为未来的改进提供了方向。

pairs.src: Table 4 summarizes the advantages and limitations of the various improved versions of DETR.
pairs.tgt: Table 4 总结了 DETR 各种改进版本的优势与局限性。

pairs.src: Some of the key open challenges and future directions are as follows.
pairs.tgt: 一些关键的开放性挑战与未来方向如下。

pairs.src: Improving the attention mechanisms: The performance of detection transformers heavily relies on the attention mechanism to capture dependencies between spatial locations in an image.
pairs.tgt: 改进注意力机制：检测 Transformer 的性能高度依赖于注意力机制来捕捉图像中空间位置之间的依赖关系。

pairs.src: To date, around 60% of modifications in DETR have focused on the attention mechanism to improve performance and training convergence.
pairs.tgt: 迄今为止，DETR 中约 60% 的改进集中于注意力机制，以提升性能和训练收敛速度。

pairs.src: Future research could explore more refined attention mechanisms to better capture spatial information or incorporate task-specific constraints.
pairs.tgt: 未来研究可以探索更精细的注意力机制，以更好地捕捉空间信息或融入任务特定的约束。

pairs.src: Adaptive and dynamic backbones: The backbone architecture significantly affects network performance and size.
pairs.tgt: 自适应和动态骨干网络：骨干网络架构显著影响网络性能和模型规模。

pairs.src: Current detection transformers often use fixed backbones or remove them entirely.
pairs.tgt: 当前的检测 Transformer 通常采用固定的骨干网络或完全去除骨干网络。

pairs.src: Only about 10% of DETR modifications have targeted the backbone to improve performance or reduce model size.
pairs.tgt: 仅有约 10% 的 DETR 改进针对骨干网络以提升性能或减小模型规模。

pairs.src: Future work could investigate dynamic backbone architectures that adjust their complexity based on the input image, potentially enhancing both efficiency and accuracy.
pairs.tgt: 未来工作可以研究动态骨干网络架构，根据输入图像调整其复杂度，从而有望同时提升效率和精度。

pairs.src: Improving the quantity and quality of object queries: In DETR, the number of object queries fed to the decoder is typically fixed during training and inference, but the number of objects in an image varies.
pairs.tgt: 提高目标查询的数量和质量：在 DETR 中，输入解码器的目标查询数量在训练和推理期间通常是固定的，但图像中的目标数量是变化的。

pairs.src: Later approaches, such as DAB-DETR, DN-DETR, and DINO, demonstrate that adjusting the quantity or quality of object queries can significantly impact performance.
pairs.tgt: 后续方法，如 DAB-DETR、DN-DETR 和 DINO，表明调整目标查询的数量或质量可以显著影响性能。

pairs.src: DAB-DETR uses dynamic anchor boxes as queries, DN-DETR adds positive noise to queries for denoising training, and DINO adds both positive and negative noise for improved denoising.
pairs.tgt: DAB-DETR 使用动态锚框作为查询，DN-DETR 向查询添加正噪声用于去噪训练，DINO 同时添加正噪声和负噪声以改进去噪效果。

pairs.src: Future models could dynamically adjust the number of object queries based on image content and incorporate adaptive mechanisms to improve query quality.
pairs.tgt: 未来模型可以根据图像内容动态调整目标查询数量，并融入自适应机制以提高查询质量。

pairs.src: Emerging directions: Beyond attention mechanisms, backbones, and object queries, several additional challenges remain.
pairs.tgt: 新兴方向：除注意力机制、骨干网络和目标查询之外，仍存在若干额外挑战。

pairs.src: Improving training efficiency through faster convergence strategies and sample-efficient learning could make DETR more practical for large-scale applications.
pairs.tgt: 通过更快的收敛策略和样本高效学习来提高训练效率，可以使 DETR 更适用于大规模应用。

pairs.src: Integrating multitask learning, such as jointly performing detection, segmentation, and tracking, can leverage shared representations for better performance.
pairs.tgt: 整合多任务学习，如联合执行检测、分割和跟踪，可以利用共享表征获得更好的性能。

pairs.src: Enhancing robustness and generalization under occlusions, domain shifts, or low-resolution inputs is also critical.
pairs.tgt: 增强在遮挡、域偏移或低分辨率输入条件下的鲁棒性和泛化能力同样至关重要。

pairs.src: Interdisciplinary approaches could incorporate reinforcement learning to guide model adaptation, NLP-inspired sequence modeling to improve feature interactions, or graph-based reasoning techniques to capture relationships between objects.
pairs.tgt: 跨学科方法可以融入强化学习来引导模型自适应、采用 NLP 启发的序列建模来改善特征交互，或利用基于图的推理技术来捕捉目标之间的关系。

pairs.src: Concrete research challenges include designing models that dynamically adapt to new tasks or domains and developing cross-modal attention mechanisms that integrate multiple data sources for richer scene understanding.
pairs.tgt: 具体的研究挑战包括设计能够动态适应新任务或新域的模型，以及开发整合多种数据源以实现更丰富场景理解的跨模态注意力机制。

MethodsPublications AdvantagesLimitations
UP-DETR [21] GitHub https://github.com/dddzg/up-detrCVPR 2021Pre-training for Multi-tasks learning and Multi-queries localization.Pre-training for patch localization, CNN and transformers pre-training needs to integrate.
Efficient-DETR [22]arXiv 2021Reduces decoder layers by employing dense and sparse set based networkIncrease in GFLOPs twice compared to original DETR.
SMCA-DETR [23] GitHub https: //github.com/gaopengcuhk/SMCA-DETRICCV 2021Regression-aware mechanism to increase convergence speedLow performance in detecting small objects.
TSP-DETR [24] GitHub https: / /github.com/Edward-Sun/TSP-DetectionICCV 2021Deals with issues of Hungarian loss and the cross-attention mechanism of Transformer.Uses proposals in TSP-FCOS and feature points in TSP-RCNN as in CNN-based detectors.
Conditional-DETR [25]GitHub https://gith ub.com/Atten4Vis/ConditionalDETRICCV 2021Conditional queries remove dependency on content embeddings and ease the training.Performs beter than DETR and deformable-DETR for stronger backbones.
WB-DETR [26] GitHub https://github.com/aybora/wbdetrICCV 2021Pure transformer network without backbone.Low performance on small objects.
PnP-DETR [27] GitHub https://github.com/twangnh/pnp-detrICCV 2021Sampling module provides foreground and a small quantity of background features.Breaks 2d spatial structure by taking foreground tokens and reducing background tokens.
Dynamic-DETR [28]ICCV 2021Dynamic attention provides small feature resolution and improves training convergence.Still dependent on CNN networks as convolution-based encoder and an ROI-based decoder.
YOLOS-DETR [29] GitHub https://github.com/hustvl/YOLOSNeurIPS 2021Convert ViT pre-trained on ImageNet-1k dataset into Object detector.Pre-trained ViT still needs improvements as it requires long training epochs.
Anchor-DETR [30] GitHub htps://github.c om/megvii-research/AnchorDETRAAAI 2022Object queries as anchor points that predict multiple objects at one position.Consider queries as 2D anchor points which ignore object scale.
Spare-DETR [31] GitHub https: //github.com/kakaobrain/sparse-detrICLR 2022Improve performance by updating tokens referenced by the decoder.Performance is strongly dependent on the backbone specifically for large objects.
D²ETR [32] GitHub https://github.com/ali baba/easyrobust/tree/main/ddetrarXiv 2022Decoder-only transformer network to reduce computational cost.Decreases computation comlexity significantly but has low performance on small objects.
FP-DETR [33] GitHub https: // github.com/encounter1997/FP-DETRICLR 2022Pre-Training of the encoder-only transformer.Low performance on large objects.
CF-DETR [34] GitHub https://github.com/facebookresearch/detrAAAI 2022Refine coarse features to improve localization accuracy of small objects.Addition of three new modules increase network size.
DAB-DETR [72] GitHub https: // github.com/IDEA-Research/DAB-DETRICLR 2022Anchor-boxes as queries, attention for different scale objects.Positional prior for only foreground objects.

方法发表优势局限性
UP-DETR [21] GitHub https://github.com/dddzg/up-detrCVPR 2021用于多任务学习和多查询定位的预训练。用于块定位的预训练，CNN 和 Transformer 预训练需要整合。
Efficient-DETR [22]arXiv 2021通过采用基于密集和稀疏集合的网络减少解码器层数与原始 DETR 相比 GFLOPs 增加两倍。
SMCA-DETR [23] GitHub https: //github.com/gaopengcuhk/SMCA-DETRICCV 2021回归感知机制以提高收敛速度小目标检测性能较低。
TSP-DETR [24] GitHub https: / /github.com/Edward-Sun/TSP-DetectionICCV 2021解决匈牙利损失和 Transformer 的交叉注意力机制问题。使用 TSP-FCOS 中的提议和 TSP-RCNN 中的特征点，如同基于 CNN 的检测器。
Conditional-DETR [25]GitHub https://gith ub.com/Atten4Vis/ConditionalDETRICCV 2021条件查询消除对内容嵌入的依赖并简化训练。对于更强的骨干网络，性能优于 DETR 和 deformable-DETR。
WB-DETR [26] GitHub https://github.com/aybora/wbdetrICCV 2021无骨干网络的纯 Transformer 网络。在小目标上性能较低。
PnP-DETR [27] GitHub https://github.com/twangnh/pnp-detrICCV 2021采样模块提供前景和少量背景特征。通过提取前景令牌和减少背景令牌破坏了二维空间结构。
Dynamic-DETR [28]ICCV 2021动态注意力提供较小的特征分辨率并改善训练收敛。仍然依赖 CNN 网络作为基于卷积的编码器和基于 RoI 的解码器。
YOLOS-DETR [29] GitHub https://github.com/hustvl/YOLOSNeurIPS 2021将在 ImageNet-1k 数据集上预训练的 ViT 转化为目标检测器。预训练的 ViT 仍需改进，因为它需要较长的训练轮次。
Anchor-DETR [30] GitHub htps://github.c om/megvii-research/AnchorDETRAAAI 2022目标查询作为锚点，在一个位置预测多个目标。将查询视为二维锚点，忽略了目标尺度。
Spare-DETR [31] GitHub https: //github.com/kakaobrain/sparse-detrICLR 2022通过更新解码器引用的令牌来提升性能。性能强烈依赖于骨干网络，尤其对大目标。
D²ETR [32] GitHub https://github.com/ali baba/easyrobust/tree/main/ddetrarXiv 2022仅解码器 Transformer 网络以降低计算成本。显著降低了计算复杂度，但在小目标上性能较低。
FP-DETR [33] GitHub https: // github.com/encounter1997/FP-DETRICLR 2022仅编码器 Transformer 的预训练。在大目标上性能较低。
CF-DETR [34] GitHub https://github.com/facebookresearch/detrAAAI 2022细化粗粒度特征以提高小目标的定位精度。新增三个模块增加了网络规模。
DAB-DETR [72] GitHub https: // github.com/IDEA-Research/DAB-DETRICLR 2022锚框作为查询，针对不同尺度目标的注意力。仅为前景目标提供位置先验。

方法发表优势局限性
DN-DETR [35] GitHub https: / / github.com/IDEA-Research/DN-DETRCVPR 2022对前景和背景区域的位置先验进行去噪训练。通过向目标查询添加正噪声进行去噪训练，忽略了背景区域。
AdaMixer [36] GitHub https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixerCVPR 2022更快的收敛，提高基于查询的解码机制的适应性。参数量大。
REGO [37] GitHub https://github.com/zhe chen/Deformable-DETR-REGOCVPR 2022注意力机制逐渐更精确地聚焦于前景区域。多阶段基于 RoI 的注意力建模增加了参数量。
DINO [38] GitHub https: / /github.com/facebookresearch/dinoarXiv 2022在中小规模数据集上取得令人瞩目的结果对大尺寸目标的性能下降
Co-DETR [39] GitHub https://github.com/Sense-X/Co-DETRICCV 2023通过协作混合分配增强编码器特征学习和解码器注意力。由于多个分配头增加了训练复杂度。
LW-DETR [40] GitHub https:/ /github.com/Atten4Vis/LW-DETRarXiv 2024通过优化的 ViT 编码器和窗口注意力的轻量级 Transformer 设计实现实时检测。在基准上的评估有限；不如 YOLO 系列检测器成熟。

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 6. Conclusions

pairs.src: Conclusions
pairs.tgt: 结论

blocks.heading: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review > 6. Conclusions

pairs.src: Detection transformers have transformed object detection by enabling fully end-to-end models that eliminate the need for proposal generation and complex post-processing, while also providing insights into the inner workings of deep neural networks.
pairs.tgt: 检测 Transformer 通过实现完全端到端的模型，消除了对提议生成和复杂后处理的需求，同时为深度神经网络的内部工作机制提供了洞察，从而变革了目标检测领域。

pairs.src: This review presented a detailed overview of DETR and its variants, focusing on recent advancements designed to improve performance and training convergence.
pairs.tgt: 本综述详细概述了 DETR 及其变体，重点关注旨在提升性能和训练收敛速度的最新进展。

pairs.src: In particular, modifications to the attention module in the encoder–decoder network and updates to object queries have enhanced training stability and performance, especially for small objects.
pairs.tgt: 特别是，编码器-解码器网络中注意力模块的改进和目标查询的更新增强了训练稳定性和性能，尤其对小目标效果显著。

pairs.src: Other improvements include backbone refinements, query design enhancements, and attention mechanism optimizations, all of which contribute to better accuracy and efficiency.
pairs.tgt: 其他改进包括骨干网络优化、查询设计增强和注意力机制优化，所有这些都促进了精度和效率的提升。

pairs.src: From this survey, several high-level patterns emerge.
pairs.tgt: 从本综述中可以归纳出几个高层趋势。

pairs.src: Slow convergence and limited small-object detection remain central challenges, driving innovations in attention mechanisms, query design, and backbone architecture.
pairs.tgt: 收敛缓慢和小目标检测能力有限仍然是核心挑战，推动着注意力机制、查询设计和骨干网络架构方面的创新。

pairs.src: Across DETR variants, commonalities include the use of transformer-based attention, modular encoder–decoder design, and strategies to increase positive supervision, while differences arise in how variants balance accuracy versus efficiency, implement multi-scale feature fusion, and assign object queries.
pairs.tgt: 在 DETR 变体中，共同点包括使用基于 Transformer 的注意力、模块化编码器-解码器设计以及增加正监督的策略，而差异则体现在变体如何平衡精度与效率、实现多尺度特征融合以及分配目标查询等方面。

pairs.src: Research diverges along two primary paths: accuracy-focused methods leverage deeper backbones and extensive pre-training, while efficiency-oriented approaches adopt lightweight, sparse, or deformable architectures such as RT-DETR and LW-DETR, which achieve competitive performance with lower computational cost.
pairs.tgt: 研究沿两条主要路径分化：以精度为导向的方法利用更深的骨干网络和广泛的预训练，而以效率为导向的方法采用轻量级、稀疏或可变形架构，如 RT-DETR 和 LW-DETR，以较低的计算成本实现有竞争力的性能。

pairs.src: Recent trends further emphasize efficiency, multitask learning, and cross-modal integration, enabling faster convergence, improved generalization, and broader scene understanding that encompasses detection, segmentation, tracking, and vision–language reasoning.
pairs.tgt: 最新趋势进一步强调效率、多任务学习和跨模态整合，实现了更快的收敛、更好的泛化以及更广泛的场景理解，涵盖检测、分割、跟踪和视觉-语言推理。

pairs.src: Key insights from this survey indicate that model design is increasingly shaped by the trade-off between real-time deployment and high accuracy, and that modular, adaptive architectures are central to achieving this balance.
pairs.tgt: 本综述的关键洞察表明，模型设计越来越受到实时部署与高精度之间折中的塑造，而模块化、自适应架构是实现这一平衡的核心。

pairs.src: Overall, DETR has evolved into a modular and flexible framework capable of balancing accuracy and efficiency.
pairs.tgt: 总体而言，DETR 已发展为一个模块化且灵活的框架，能够在精度和效率之间取得平衡。

pairs.src: Future directions point toward adaptive architectures that dynamically allocate computational resources based on input complexity, robust training strategies for challenging environments, and richer contextual reasoning through multimodal integration.
pairs.tgt: 未来方向指向根据输入复杂度动态分配计算资源的自适应架构、面向挑战性环境的鲁棒训练策略，以及通过多模态整合实现更丰富的上下文推理。

pairs.src: By uniting architectural innovation with practical deployment considerations, transformers are poised to drive the next generation of scalable, intelligent, and versatile visual perception systems.
pairs.tgt: 通过将架构创新与实际部署考量相结合，Transformer 有望推动下一代可扩展、智能且多功能的视觉感知系统的发展。
